responseAndCounterClaimSubmittedParagrap: We’ve sent you a confirmation email.
Before the court can send the counterclaim to the other parties or a judge can consider it, the court must review the Help With Fees application linked to the counterclaim.
If the court does not approve your Help With Fees application, you might need to pay all or part of the counterclaim fee.
We'll notify you of the outcome of your Help With Fees application.
responseAndCounterClaimSubmittedListItem: A hearing date will be scheduled. You’ll get a notification telling you when this has happened. At the hearing, a judge will listen to both sides and make a decision. You should come to the hearing.
Some people need support to use HMCTS services, like step-free access to a court for a hearing. If you have not already, you should request support now (opens in new tab).
responseAndCounterClaimSubmittedHeading2: We’d like to hear your thoughts
responseAndCounterClaimSubmittedParagrap: Complete this short survey to help us improve this service (opens in new tab) (usually takes 5 minutes).
